technology.title: Chinese universities are cutting language majors to make way for AI
technology.summary: Universities are dropping programs in translation and foreign languages while adding degrees in embodied intelligence, AI, and robotics.

briefing.news_focus: Universities are dropping programs in translation and foreign languages while adding degrees in embodied intelligence, AI, and robotics.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國大學正在削減翻譯和外語專業，以便為人工智慧（AI）、機器人技術及具身智能等新興領域的學位課程騰出空間。這一變化反映了教育體系對科技發展的回應，並顯示出對未來職場需求的重新評估。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，中國政府和教育機構正積極推動科技教育的轉型。過去幾年，AI和機器人技術在中國的應用越來越廣泛，促使大學調整課程設置以符合市場需求。此舉不僅是對科技進步的回應，也是對全球競爭的適應，尤其是在科技人才的培養上。語言專業的削減可能與中國在國際舞台上日益增強的自信心有關，顯示出對外語需求的相對減少。
briefing.analysis: 這一政策變化可能會引發多方利益關係的調整。首先，科技企業將受益於更多具備AI和機器人技術知識的人才，這有助於推動行業創新與發展。其次，語言專業的學生和教師可能會感受到職業前景的壓力，因為市場需求的轉變使得他們的專業價值受到挑戰。此外，這一變化也可能引發社會對教育多樣性的討論，因為語言能力在全球化背景下仍然具有重要意義。未來，這一趨勢可能會進一步影響中國高等教育的結構，並引發其他國家對其教育政策的反思。

technology.title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
technology.summary: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails. Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]

briefing.news_focus: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails. Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府要求Anthropic撤回其最新的兩個模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，理由是國家安全考量，因為亞馬遜研究人員發現可以繞過Fable 5的安全防護。此舉引發了網絡安全研究人員的擔憂，他們簽署公開信表示此舉危險，並指出其他模型也存在類似的漏洞。這一事件引發了對Anthropic品牌的討論。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於人工智慧的公司，其產品Fable 5和Mythos 5是最新的AI模型。美國政府對於AI技術的監管日益嚴格，尤其是在國家安全的背景下，這使得相關企業面臨更大的挑戰。此次事件反映出政府在保護國家安全與促進科技創新之間的矛盾，並且引發了業界對於AI模型安全性的廣泛討論。
briefing.analysis: 此次美國政府的禁令可能意外地提升了Anthropic的品牌知名度，因為這一事件引發了廣泛的媒體關注和討論。網絡安全研究人員的公開信強調了政府行動的潛在危險，這可能使得公眾對AI技術的安全性有了更深的認識。值得注意的是，Anthropic指出其他模型也存在相似的安全漏洞，這可能使政府的行動受到質疑，並引發對於AI監管政策的重新評估。未來，政府可能需要在安全與創新之間找到更好的平衡，以避免對科技發展造成不必要的阻礙。

technology.title: Wife of detained ex-Sri Lankan intelligence chief alleges harassment by agencies
technology.summary: I've been informed by my children that upon leaving the hospital premises, a CID officer has entered the lift with them and appeared to follow them, says Manori Sallay, ex- Sri Lanka's State Intelligence Service head Suresh Sallay's wife

briefing.news_focus: I've been informed by my children that upon leaving the hospital premises, a CID officer has entered the lift with them and appeared to follow them, says Manori Sallay, ex- Sri Lanka's State Intelligence Service head Suresh Sallay's wife
briefing.news_focus_zh: 斯里蘭卡前情報首長蘇雷什·薩拉伊的妻子馬諾里·薩拉伊指控，當她的孩子們從醫院離開時，遭到刑事調查局（CID）官員的跟蹤。她表示，該官員在電梯內與她的孩子同乘，這一行為讓她感到不安，並懷疑當局對她家庭的騷擾。
briefing.background: 蘇雷什·薩拉伊曾擔任斯里蘭卡國家情報局的負責人，該機構在國內安全和反恐方面扮演重要角色。隨著斯里蘭卡政治局勢的變化，特別是在內戰結束後，情報機構的運作和透明度受到關注。近期，隨著政治緊張局勢的升高，對前官員及其家人的監視行為引發了社會的廣泛討論，尤其是在涉及人權和政府監控的議題上。
briefing.analysis: 馬諾里·薩拉伊的指控反映了斯里蘭卡當前政治環境中的緊張局勢，尤其是在前政府官員及其家屬面臨的潛在威脅。這一事件可能引發對政府行為的進一步審視，尤其是在涉及人權和公民自由的問題上。各方可能會對此事件作出不同反應：支持政府的人士可能會認為這是維護國家安全的必要措施，而人權倡導者則可能將其視為對個人自由的侵犯。隨著事件的發展，可能會出現對政府行為的法律挑戰，進一步加劇社會的分歧。

politics.title: First Thing: Iran says there is ‘progress’ in talks despite Trump’s coarse threats
politics.summary: US president threatened Iran over strait of Hormuz in sweary outburst. Plus, Starmer to step down as UK’s PM two years after historic landslide Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Sign up here Good morning. Iran’s foreign minister has declared “progress” after the first day of talks between high-ranking officials from Washington and Tehran ended in Switzerland, despite a tense opening marked by Donald Trump’s threats to restart attacks. Abbas Araghchi said Pakistani and Qatari mediation “has delivered major progress to end [the] Lebanon war”. Iran has been adamant that Israeli attacks on Hezbollah in Lebanon must end as part of any deal. The Israelis are not directly participating in the talks. What has been agreed? A joint statement from mediators Qatar and Pakistan said the ⁠US and Iran agreed a roadmap towards⁠ a final deal within 60 days. Technical talks between lower-ranked officials ​will continue for the rest of the week. In a development that is critical to unlocking progress, the US Treasury was also preparing to issue a 60-day waiver lifting sanctions on oil, petrochemicals and derivatives. What threat did Trump issue to the Iranians? Over the weekend, Iran said it had reinstated its blockade in the strait of Hormuz in protest at the continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon. The US president responded on social media, saying: “You close it and you won’t have a country. You won’t even make it back to your fucking country.” What impact has the war had on support within Iran for the government? Saeed Shah reports that the war has triggered a rare moment of solidarity in a country that was reeling from the killing of thousands of protesters by the authorities at the start of the year. Why has Starmer stood down? After months of internal party pressure and plunging poll numbers, his downfall has been triggered by key political misjudgments including appointing the Jeffery Epstein-linked Peter Mandelson as US ambassador despite a failed security vetting. Policy reversals have led to his MPs viewing him as weak, a sentiment reinforced by devastating losses in the May elections that underscored his deep unpopularity with voters. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: US president threatened Iran over strait of Hormuz in sweary outburst. After months of internal party pressure and plunging poll numbers, his downfall has been triggered by key political misjudgments including appointing the Jeffery Epstein-linked Peter Mandelson as US ambassador despite a failed security vetting. Policy reversals have led to his MPs viewing him as weak, a sentiment reinforced by devastating losses in the May elections that underscored his deep unpopularity with voters. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇在瑞士的美伊高層會談首日後表示，雙方在談判中取得了進展。儘管美國總統特朗普對伊朗發出威脅，稱若封鎖霍爾木茲海將面臨嚴重後果，會談仍然繼續進行。卡塔爾和巴基斯坦作為調解者，發表聯合聲明指出，美伊雙方同意在60天內達成最終協議的路線圖，並將在接下來的幾天內進行技術性談判。美國財政部也計劃在60天內解除對石油及其衍生品的制裁。
briefing.background: 此次美伊會談是在霍爾木茲海局勢緊張的背景下進行的，伊朗因以色列對黎巴嫩的攻擊而重新封鎖該海域。特朗普的威脅反映了美國對伊朗行為的強烈反應，並可能影響談判的氣氛。伊朗方面則強調，任何協議必須包括結束以色列對真主黨的攻擊。此次會談由卡塔爾和巴基斯坦調解，顯示出這兩國在中東地區的外交影響力。
briefing.analysis: 此次會談的進展對伊朗來說是一個重要的外交勝利，特別是在特朗普的威脅下，伊朗依然能夠保持談判的主動權。參考報導1指出，特朗普的威脅實際上可能被視為對伊朗的一種暫時性停火，這在某種程度上增強了伊朗的談判籌碼。參考報導2提供了會談的主要要點，強調了雙方在未來60天內達成協議的可能性，這顯示出各方在尋求穩定局勢的共同利益。然而，若以色列繼續其軍事行動，可能會對談判進程造成影響，並引發新的衝突。

supporting_titles: Trump’s ceasefire is a victory for Iran
Key points from the first round of Iran-U.S. talks
supporting_summaries: Here are the main points from the joint Qatar-Pakistan statement at the conclusion of first-round talks

politics.title: Political turmoil: UK will see its seventh prime minister in 10 years
politics.summary: After less than two years as PM, Keir Starmer announces his resignation amid mounting pressure from own Labour Party.

briefing.news_focus: After less than two years as PM, Keir Starmer announces his resignation amid mounting pressure from own Labour Party.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國首相基爾·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）在任期不到兩年後宣布辭職，原因是來自工黨內部的壓力與地方選舉的失利。這一決定標誌著英國將迎來第七位首相，反映出當前政治局勢的動盪。
briefing.background: 英國工黨在最近的地方選舉中遭遇重大失利，這使得斯塔默面臨來自黨內的強烈反對聲浪。工黨內部的分歧與不滿情緒加劇，導致斯塔默的領導地位岌岌可危。過去十年，英國經歷了多次政權更迭，政治穩定性受到挑戰，這也使得選民對現任政府的信任度下降。
briefing.analysis: 斯塔默的辭職反映了工黨內部的深刻分歧，尤其是在面對選舉失利後，黨內對其領導能力的質疑加劇。根據參考報導，斯塔默在辭職前曾與國王查爾斯三世進行了通報，顯示出其辭職的正式性與嚴重性。未來，工黨將面臨選擇新領導人的挑戰，而這可能會影響到其在即將到來的全國大選中的表現。不同報導中，Fox News特別強調了地方選舉的失利對斯塔默辭職的直接影響，而The Hindu則著重於斯塔默與國王的溝通過程，顯示出其辭職的正式性。

supporting_titles: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister after devastating Labour revolt and local election losses
Keir Starmer announces his resignation as U.K. Prime Minister
supporting_summaries: British PM Keir Starmer announced his resignation after Labour's devastating local election losses and a mounting revolt from within his own party ranks.
Prime Minister Keir Starmer had informed King Charles III of his decision on Monday morning, following a weekend of deliberation at his official country home, Chequers

politics.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation plan
politics.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer was visibly emotional as he announced plans to step down.

briefing.news_focus: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer was visibly emotional as he announced plans to step down.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國首相基爾·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）在情緒激動的情況下宣布計劃辭職，這一消息震驚了政壇。斯塔默的辭職決定是在經過一周末的深思熟慮後做出的，並已於週一早上通知了查爾斯三世國王。
briefing.background: 斯塔默的辭職決定是在英國工黨面臨重大挑戰的背景下做出的，尤其是最近的地方選舉中遭遇慘敗，這使得他在黨內的支持受到嚴重考驗。工黨內部的反叛聲音日益增強，許多黨員對斯塔默的領導能力表示懷疑，這使得他不得不考慮辭職的選擇。這一事件發生在英國政治氣候不穩定的時期，對未來的選舉和政策方向可能產生深遠影響。
briefing.analysis: 斯塔默的辭職反映了工黨內部的分歧與不滿，尤其是在選舉失利後，黨內對其領導的質疑聲音愈發強烈。根據《福克斯新聞》的報導，斯塔默的辭職與黨內的叛變有關，顯示出他在黨內的支持基礎已經動搖。另一方面，《印度教徒報》則強調了斯塔默在做出辭職決定前的深思熟慮，這可能暗示他對未來的政治生涯仍有考量。隨著工黨尋求新的領導者，未來的政治格局將可能出現變化，尤其是在即將到來的選舉中，工黨需要重新獲得選民的信任。

supporting_titles: Keir Starmer announces his resignation as U.K. Prime Minister
Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister after devastating Labour revolt and local election losses
supporting_summaries: Prime Minister Keir Starmer had informed King Charles III of his decision on Monday morning, following a weekend of deliberation at his official country home, Chequers
British PM Keir Starmer announced his resignation after Labour's devastating local election losses and a mounting revolt from within his own party ranks.

economy.title: ‘Every time you turn around, there’s a new price increase’: US small-business optimism plummets
economy.summary: At the same time, 29% of small-business owners also report having open positions they can’t fill Amid rising fuel prices and inflation across the US, confidence among small-business owners has declined in recent weeks as many continue to grapple with higher costs and economic uncertainty. According to the National Federation of Independent Business, its Small Business Optimism Index fell by 0.6 points to 95.3 in May. At the same time, 29% of small-business owners reported having open positions they could not fill – the lowest level since the Covid-19 pandemic. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: At the same time, 29% of small-business owners also report having open positions they can’t fill Amid rising fuel prices and inflation across the US, confidence among small-business owners has declined in recent weeks as many continue to grapple with higher costs and economic uncertainty. According to the National Federation of Independent Business, its Small Business Optimism Index fell by 0.6 points to 95.3 in May. At the same time, 29% of small-business owners reported having open positions they could not fill – the lowest level since the Covid-19 pandemic. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國小企業主的信心因燃料價格上漲和通脹持續上升而顯著下降。根據全國獨立企業聯盟的數據，小企業樂觀指數在5月份下降了0.6點，降至95.3。此外，29%的小企業主表示有職位空缺無法填補，這是自新冠疫情以來的最低水平，顯示出經濟不確定性對小企業的影響。
briefing.background: 美國小企業在經濟中扮演著重要角色，然而，隨著通脹上升和燃料價格飆升，這些企業面臨著前所未有的挑戰。根據全國獨立企業聯盟的報告，這些小企業的信心指數反映了他們對未來經濟狀況的擔憂。此外，勞動市場的緊張情況也使得小企業難以招聘到合適的人才，進一步加劇了他們的經營困難。這些因素共同影響了小企業的運營和發展前景。
briefing.analysis: 小企業主的信心下降反映了當前經濟環境的挑戰，尤其是通脹和燃料價格的上升。這對於小企業的生存與發展構成了壓力，因為他們通常缺乏大企業的資源來應對成本上升。根據參考報導，全球化的變化可能影響到美國的經濟環境，特別是在國家自主權和經濟整合的背景下，這可能會進一步影響小企業的經營策略和市場定位。未來，小企業可能需要尋求創新和靈活的解決方案來應對這些挑戰，並可能促使政策制定者考慮如何支持這一重要經濟部門。

supporting_summaries: In the age of Donald Trump, national autonomy requires deeper integration. Brazil shows why

economy.title: Alan Greenspan, architect of the modern American economy, dies aged 100
economy.summary: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.

briefing.news_focus: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國聯邦儲備委員會前主席艾倫·格林斯潘（Alan Greenspan）於100歲逝世，成為全球最具影響力的銀行家之一。他在四位總統任內擔任聯儲主席，對美國貨幣政策的制定影響深遠。根據報導，格林斯潘因帕金森病併發症去世，這一消息由他的妻子安德烈亞·米切爾（Andrea Mitchell）透露。
briefing.background: 艾倫·格林斯潘於1987年至2006年擔任美國聯邦儲備委員會主席，期間經歷了多次經濟波動，包括1990年代的經濟繁榮和2008年金融危機的前夕。他的政策被認為是推動美國經濟增長的重要因素，尤其是在科技泡沫時期。格林斯潘的任期內，聯儲的利率政策和通脹控制策略對全球金融市場產生了深遠影響，並使他成為經濟學界的標誌性人物。
briefing.analysis: 格林斯潘的逝世對金融市場的影響尚不明朗，但市場在他去世的消息中顯示出相對穩定，這可能與英國首相基爾·史達默的辭職同時發生有關。根據參考報導，市場對於即將進行的領導競選持謹慎態度，並希望候選人能夠清晰表達其政策立場，以減少不確定性。儘管格林斯潘的影響力無可否認，但當前市場的焦點似乎更集中於英國的政治變局，顯示出不同事件間的相互影響。

supporting_titles: Alan Greenspan, longtime head of the US federal reserve, dies aged 100
Markets steady as prime minister Keir Starmer resigns; ex-Fed chair Alan Greenspan dies at 100 – business live
supporting_summaries: Greenspan served under the presidencies of Ronald Reagan, George HW Bush, Bill Clinton and George W Bush Alan Greenspan , the influential economist who ​steered US ⁠monetary policy ⁠during ​his ‌five ‌terms as chair ‌of the Federal Reserve ‌under four presidents, ​has died aged 100, according to the Fed. In a statement that she shared with NBC News , Andrea Mitchell – Greenspan’s wife and a correspondent of the network – said he died from complications of Parkinson’s disease. Continue reading...

Sterling and gilts avoid major swings amid Starmer’s resignation Markets seem to be appeased by news of a (relatively) standard leadership contest, which will shake out any policy positions from prospective prime minister before they take post. That could help reduce any jitters from some corners of the market ove r Andy Burnham’s potential leadership. according to Richard Carter , head of fixed interest research at Quilter Cheviot . Markets are wary of Burnham’s previous policy positions so they would prefer to see ideas for governing fleshed out via a leadership contest, keeping surprises to a minimum. There are difficult decisions around welfare and defence spending lurking, with each likely to have an impact on gilts and wider UK markets. Continue reading...

economy.title: The panda bonds: how China uses assets to boost yuan’s profile, cement partnerships
economy.summary: Brazil is set to become the latest major economy to issue panda bonds – yuan-denominated debt sold in the Chinese market – joining a growing group of countries that has embraced assets backed by China’s currency as a means of fundraising. According to analysts, the participation of Brazil – a founding member of the Brics (Brazil, Russia, India, China and South Africa) bloc of emerging markets and the world’s 10th-largest economy – marked a milestone for China, which is leveraging the wide...

briefing.news_focus: Brazil is set to become the latest major economy to issue panda bonds – yuan-denominated debt sold in the Chinese market – joining a growing group of countries that has embraced assets backed by China’s currency as a means of fundraising. According to analysts, the participation of Brazil – a founding member of the Brics (Brazil, Russia, India, China and South Africa) bloc of emerging markets and the world’s 10th-largest economy – marked a milestone for China, which is leveraging the wide...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 巴西即將發行熊貓債，這是以人民幣計價的債務，將在中國市場上銷售。巴西的參與標誌著中國在推動人民幣國際化及加強與新興市場國家的合作方面取得了重要進展，巴西作為金磚國家之一，這一舉措被視為對中國貨幣的信任與支持。
briefing.background: 熊貓債是指外國發行的以人民幣計價的債券，旨在吸引國際資本並促進人民幣的國際化。隨著中國經濟的增長及其在全球市場中的影響力提升，越來越多的國家選擇發行熊貓債作為融資工具。巴西的參與不僅顯示了其對中國市場的重視，也反映出金磚國家之間日益增強的經濟合作關係。這一趨勢可能會進一步促進中國與其他新興市場國家的經濟聯繫。
briefing.analysis: 巴西發行熊貓債的決定對於中國來說是一次戰略性勝利，因為這不僅增強了人民幣的國際地位，還有助於深化與巴西的經濟合作。巴西作為全球第十大經濟體，其參與可能會激勵其他國家跟進，進一步推動熊貓債的發行熱潮。不同於參考報導中提到的東南亞國家與俄羅斯的能源合作，巴西的熊貓債主要集中在資本市場的融資，顯示出各國在與中國的合作中有著不同的重點與策略。未來，隨著更多國家加入熊貓債的行列，中國可能會在全球金融體系中獲得更大的影響力。
